project_type: Next.js 15 supermarket ordering app with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Capacitor (hybrid mobile)
build_system: Next.js with npm scripts, Prisma for DB. Scripts: npm run build (prisma generate && next build), npm run dev
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx next build to verify no type errors or build failures. 2. Run npx tsx --test tests/*.test.ts for existing tests.
setup_instructions: npm install, then npx next build
environment_constraints: No database available (Prisma generate needed but no DB connection for full build). Use next build --no-lint as fallback if lint issues arise from unrelated code. The project uses 'use client' directives extensively for client components.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: Framer Motion for animations, Lucide React for icons, Tailwind CSS for styling, iOS-style design language, dark mode support via next-themes with class strategy.
key_patterns: 1. Client components use 'use client' directive. 2. Animations use framer-motion (motion.div with spring transitions). 3. Dark mode via .dark class with CSS variables in globals.css. 4. Mobile-first design with iOS safe area padding (pt-safe, pb-safe). 5. Cards use rounded-2xl/3xl with card-shadow or ios-squircle-card classes. 6. Fonts: Inter Tight (body), Manrope (headings/display). 7. Colors: primary=#050505, success=#22C55E, green accents. 8. Press feedback via .press class (scale 0.97 on active). 9. API routes at app/api/, SSE streaming for live updates. 10. Existing tracking API at /api/orders/[id]/tracking and /api/orders/[id]/stream.
directory_structure: app/ (Next.js routes and API), components/ (React components organized by feature: admin/, cart/, checkout/, dashboard/, delivery/, home/, ui/), lib/ (utilities, constants, prisma), prisma/ (schema), public/ (static assets)
